transcription.text: People knew Ish and Daryl worked together and I had no problem taking care of the filming overall! Thank you so much for watching! Don't miss out next week's video for my fallight, visiting Tylenol Che Unfortunately Harlee... That's it for now and until next time, bye!! Love you! Peace!
